content: Artificial gatekeeping... They will have people that want to meet but unable to match unless you pay They already make money off you through the back end

Purchased lifetime premium a few weeks ago because it promised up to 10x more matches over non-premium. I literally haven't gotten a single match since upgrading. IDK how their algorithm works,but it would appear that ""premium"" is just snake oil. Bumble basically stole $180 of my hard-earned money and their support is completely non-existent and never responds to email,so i had to contact Google as well as my credit card company to get my money back. I would give a negative rating if i could.
Why is it so hard to pay for bumble premium? I have to keep trying multiple times before it is accepted

This app at its core is a good idea. However,you can like the men who like you and they still never respond. The app has also gotten more expensive. I just don't think its worth it when there is a very low success on this app.
forced payments to get good services. but not bad
Please dont pay this app. They Wil bann your account without any reason and dont refund just they cheat
Waste of money and time,i have subscribed for week and have two days trying to open the app and i cant get acces to it😭 .

I'd give 0 if I could. A huge waste of money. I've canceled premium 3 times after no matches. Each time I do,I get a match (that you can't see without premium) within that hour. So like a dummy I got premium again only for the matches to dissappear. 🗑
